---
title: "TFM_V2"
author: "RIVILLA_CRISTIAN"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Preparar librerías
install.packages("BiocManager")
library(BiocManager)
install.packages("rlang")
update.packages(ask = FALSE)

BiocManager::install(c("TCGAbiolinks", "maftools"))
install.packages("dplyr")
install.packages("readr")
install.packages("stringr")
install.packages("VennDiagram")

library(TCGAbiolinks)
library(maftools)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel)
library(VennDiagram)
library(broom)

```


```{r}
# 1. DATOS EN TCGA
# Búsqueda en TCGA
query_maf <- GDCquery( 
  project = "TCGA-SKCM", 
  data.category = "Simple Nucleotide Variation", 
  data.type = "Masked Somatic Mutation" 
) 
 
GDCdownload(query_maf) 
maf_q <- GDCprepare(query_maf) 

# Formato MAF
maf_tcga <- maf_q %>% 
  as.data.frame() 

# Datos clínicos
clinical_tcga <- GDCquery_clinic("TCGA-SKCM", type = "clinical") %>% 
  select(patient = submitter_id, gender) 
 
maf_tcga <- maf_tcga %>% #se integran los datos
  mutate(patient = substr(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, 1, 12)) %>% 
  inner_join(clinical_tcga, by = "patient")

coding_variants <- c(
  "Missense_Mutation",
  "Nonsense_Mutation",
  "Frame_Shift_Del",
  "Frame_Shift_Ins",
  "Splice_Site",
  "Nonstop_Mutation",
  "In_Frame_Del",
  "In_Frame_Ins",
  "Translation_Start_Site"
)

# 2. LIMPIEZA
maf_tcga_clean <- maf_tcga %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gender),
    !is.na(Hugo_Symbol),
    !is.na(Variant_Classification),
    Variant_Classification %in% coding_variants
  )

# 3. CREAR MAF
maf_tcga_obj <- read.maf(maf = maf_tcga_clean)

# 4. TMB
tmb_tcga <- tmb(maf = maf_tcga_obj)
tmb_tcga <- tmb_tcga %>% mutate(patient = substr(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, 1, 12)) %>% left_join( maf_tcga_clean %>% distinct(patient, gender), by = "patient" )

summary(tmb_tcga$TMB)
 wilcox.test(total_perMB ~ gender, data = tmb_tcga)


# 5. FRECUENCIA DE GENES
gene_freq_tcga <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  distinct(patient, gender, Hugo_Symbol) %>%
  count(gender, Hugo_Symbol, name = "n_patients_mut") %>%
  left_join(
    maf_tcga_clean %>%
      distinct(patient, gender) %>%
      count(gender, name = "n_total"),
    by = "gender"
  ) %>%
  mutate(freq = n_patients_mut / n_total) %>%
  arrange(gender, desc(freq))

# 6. TOP GENES
top_genes_tcga <- gene_freq_tcga %>% 
  group_by(gender) %>% 
  slice_max(freq, n = 10)
View(top_genes_tcga)

ggplot(top_genes_tcga, aes(x = reorder(Hugo_Symbol, freq), y = freq, fill = gender)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~gender, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Top mutated genes by sex (TCGA)",
       x = "Gene",
       y = "proportion of patients")


# 7. MAF COMPARE
male_samples <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(gender == "male") %>%
  distinct(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  pull()

female_samples <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(gender == "female") %>%
  distinct(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  pull()

maf_compare <- mafCompare(
  m1 = subsetMaf(maf_tcga_obj, tsb = male_samples),
  m2 = subsetMaf(maf_tcga_obj, tsb = female_samples)
)

head(maf_compare$results)

# Guardar resultados
write.csv(
  maf_compare$results,
  "results/maf_compare_TCGA.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  top_genes_tcga,
  "results/top_genes_TCGA.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```



```{r}
# cBioPortal
# 1. BUSQUEDA EN cBioPortal
leer_estudio_cbio <- function(mut_file, clin_file, study_name, comment = "") {
  
  maf <- read_tsv(mut_file, comment = comment, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  clin <- read_tsv(clin_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    rename(
      patient = `#Patient Identifier`,
      gender = Sex
    ) %>%
    distinct(patient, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  maf %>%
    mutate(patient = str_sub(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, 1, 12)) %>%
    left_join(clin, by = "patient") %>%
    mutate(
      gender = str_to_lower(gender),
      source = "cBioPortal",
      study = study_name
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Hugo_Symbol),
      !is.na(Variant_Classification),
      !is.na(Tumor_Sample_Barcode)
    )
}

# 2. ESTUDIOS PARA LA BUSQUEDA
estudios_cbio <- list(
  list("M_Melanoma_DFCI_2015/DFCI_2015_mutations.txt", "M_Melanoma_DFCI_2015/DFCI_2015_patient.txt", "DFCI_2015", ""),
  list("Melanoma_Broad_2012/Broad_2012_mutations.txt", "Melanoma_Broad_2012/Broad_2012_patient.txt", "Broad_2012", ""),
  list("S_Melanoma_Broad_2012/SM_Broad_2012_mutations.txt", "S_Melanoma_Broad_2012/SM_Broad_2012_patient.txt", "SM_Broad_2012", "#"),
  list("S_Melanoma_Broad_2014/SM_Broad_2014_mutations.txt", "S_Melanoma_Broad_2014/SM_Broad_2014_patient.txt", "SM_Broad_2014", "#"),
  list("S_Melanoma_Yale_2012/Yale_2012_mutations.txt", "S_Melanoma_Yale_2012/Yale_2012_patient.txt", "Yale_2012", "")
)

# UNION DE ESTUDIOS
maf_cbioP <- purrr::map_dfr(
  estudios_cbio,
  ~ leer_estudio_cbio(.x[[1]], .x[[2]], .x[[3]], .x[[4]])
)  

# LIMPIEZA
maf_cbio_clean <- maf_cbioP %>%
  mutate(
    Variant_Classification = case_when(
      Variant_Classification == "NONSENSE" ~ "Nonsense_Mutation",
      TRUE ~ Variant_Classification
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gender),
    !is.na(Hugo_Symbol),
    !is.na(Variant_Classification),
    Variant_Classification %in% coding_variants
  )

# CRER MAF
clinical_cbio <- maf_cbio_clean %>%
distinct(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, gender)

maf_object_cbio <- read.maf(
maf = maf_cbio_clean,
clinicalData = clinical_cbio
)

# TMB
tmb_cbio <- tmb(maf = maf_object_cbio)


tmb_cbio <- tmb_cbio %>%
  left_join(
    maf_object_cbio@clinical.data %>%
      select(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, gender),
    by = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode"
  )

wilcox.test(total_perMB ~ gender, data = tmb_cbio)

# FRECUENCIA DE GENES
gene_freq_cbio <- maf_cbio_clean %>% 
  distinct(patient, gender, Hugo_Symbol) %>% 
  count(gender, Hugo_Symbol, name = "n_patients_mut") %>% 
  left_join(
    maf_cbio_clean %>% 
      distinct(patient, gender) %>% 
      count(gender, name = "n_total"),
    by = "gender"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(freq = n_patients_mut / n_total) %>% 
  arrange(gender, desc(freq))


# TOP GENES
top_genes_cbio <- gene_freq_cbio %>% 
  group_by(gender) %>% 
  slice_max(freq, n = 10)
View(top_genes_cbio)

ggplot(top_genes_cbio, aes(x = reorder(Hugo_Symbol, freq), y = freq, fill = gender)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~gender, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Top mutated genes by sex (cBioPortal)",
       x = "Gene",
       y = "Proportion of patients")

# 8. MAF COMPARE

male_samples_cbio <- clinical_cbio %>%
  filter(gender == "male") %>%
  pull(Tumor_Sample_Barcode)

female_samples_cbio <- clinical_cbio %>%
  filter(gender == "female") %>%
  pull(Tumor_Sample_Barcode)

maf_compare_cbio <- mafCompare(  
  m1 = subsetMaf(maf_object_cbio, tsb = male_samples_cbio),
  m2 = subsetMaf(maf_object_cbio, tsb = female_samples_cbio)
)

head(maf_compare_cbio$results)

# Guardar resultados
write.csv(
  maf_compare_cbio$results,
  "results/maf_compare_cBioPortal.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  top_genes_cbio,
  "results/top_genes_cBioPortal.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
# Comparación entre bases de datos

# Ajuste de p-value por múltiples comparaciones
sig_tcga <- maf_compare$results %>% # TCGA
  filter(adjPval < 0.05)
sig_cbio <- maf_compare_cbio$results %>% # cBioPortal
  filter(adjPval < 0.05)

# Comparación
common_genes <- intersect(sig_tcga$Hugo_Symbol, sig_cbio$Hugo_Symbol)
common_genes

head(sig_tcga$Hugo_Symbol)
head(sig_cbio$Hugo_Symbol)

head(maf_compare_cbio$results[, c("Hugo_Symbol", "pval", "adjPval")]) # resultados disminuyendo la exigencia estadística
```


```{r}
# Análisis adicionales
# Carpeta de salida
dir.create("resultados_adicionales", showWarnings = FALSE)

# ONCOPLOT comparativo Hombres vs Mujeres - TCGA
male_patients_tcga <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(gender == "male") %>%
  distinct(patient) %>%
  pull()

female_patients_tcga <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(gender == "female") %>%
  distinct(patient) %>%
  pull()

# Recuperar Tumor_Sample_Barcode completos
male_samples_tcga <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(patient %in% male_patients_tcga) %>%
  distinct(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  pull()

female_samples_tcga <- maf_tcga_clean %>%
  filter(patient %in% female_patients_tcga) %>%
  distinct(Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  pull()

# Análisis MAF
maf_male_tcga <- subsetMaf(
  maf = maf_tcga_obj,
  tsb = male_samples_tcga
)

maf_female_tcga <- subsetMaf(
  maf = maf_tcga_obj,
  tsb = female_samples_tcga
)

genes_top_male <- getGeneSummary(maf_male_tcga) %>% # genes mas mutados
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  pull(Hugo_Symbol)

genes_top_female <- getGeneSummary(maf_female_tcga) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  pull(Hugo_Symbol)

genes_top <- union(genes_top_male, genes_top_female)

# Gráfico Oncoplot
png(
  filename = "figures/oncoplot_comparativo_TCGA.png",
  width = 1400,
  height = 900,
  res = 120
)

coBarplot(
  m1 = maf_male_tcga,
  m2 = maf_female_tcga,
  m1Name = "Hombres",
  m2Name = "Mujeres",
  genes = genes_top,
  titleSize = 1
)

dev.off()


# Volcano Plot

preparar_volcano <- function(res_compare, titulo, archivo_salida) {
 
  volcano_df <- res_compare$results %>%
    filter(!is.na(pval), !is.na(adjPval), !is.na(or)) %>%
    mutate(
      log2OR = log2(or + 0.01),
      neg_log10p = -log10(pval),
      status = case_when(
        adjPval < 0.05 & or > 1 ~ "Mayor en hombres",
        adjPval < 0.05 & or < 1 ~ "Mayor en mujeres",
        pval < 0.05 ~ "p < 0.05 no ajustado",
        TRUE ~ "No significativo"
      ),
      label = ifelse(adjPval < 0.05, Hugo_Symbol, NA)
    )
 
  colores <- c(
    "Mayor en hombres" = "#E05C5C",
    "Mayor en mujeres" = "#5C8AE0",
    "p < 0.05 no ajustado" = "#F0A500",
    "No significativo" = "grey70"
  )
 
  p <- ggplot(
    volcano_df,
    aes(x = log2OR, y = neg_log10p, color = status, label = label)
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.65, size = 1.8) +
    geom_text_repel(
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 15,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_hline(
      yintercept = -log10(0.05),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linetype = "solid",
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colores) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = titulo,
      x = "log2(Odds Ratio): mujeres ← 0 → hombres",
      y = "-log10(p-valor)",
      color = "Clasificación"
    )
 
  ggsave(
    filename = archivo_salida,
    plot = p,
    width = 9,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 200
  )
 
  return(p)
}

p_volcano_tcga <- preparar_volcano(
  res_compare = maf_compare,
  titulo = "Volcano plot — Diferencias por sexo en TCGA-SKCM",
  archivo_salida = "figures/volcano_TCGA.png"
)

p_volcano_cbio <- preparar_volcano(
  res_compare = maf_compare_cbio,
  titulo = "Volcano plot — Diferencias por sexo en cBioPortal",
  archivo_salida = "figures/volcano_cBioPortal.png"
)

#Comparación entre bases de datos - Diagrama de Venn
# Se usan genes con p < 0.05 como asociación nominal.
# Esta selección no equivale a significación ajustada.

genes_tcga_nominal <- maf_compare$results %>%
  filter(!is.na(pval), pval < 0.05) %>%
  pull(Hugo_Symbol) %>%
  unique()

genes_cbio_nominal <- maf_compare_cbio$results %>%
  filter(!is.na(pval), pval < 0.05) %>%
  pull(Hugo_Symbol) %>%
  unique()

genes_comunes <- intersect(genes_tcga_nominal, genes_cbio_nominal)

write.csv(
  data.frame(genes_comunes = genes_comunes),
  "resultados_adicionales/genes_comunes_TCGA_cBioPortal.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

png(
  filename = "figures/venn_comparacion_TCGA_cBioPortal.png",
  width = 1200,
  height = 900,
  res = 150
)

venn.diagram(
  x = list(
    TCGA = genes_tcga_nominal,
    cBioPortal = genes_cbio_nominal
  ),
  filename = NULL,
  main = "Intersección de genes con asociación nominal por sexo",
  fill = c("skyblue", "pink"),
  alpha = 0.5,
  cex = 1.4,
  cat.cex = 1.3
) %>%
  grid::grid.draw()

dev.off()

# Modelo GLM Exploratorio
# Este modelo es no ajustado.
# Permite explorar la asociación entre sexo y TMB, pero no permite concluir
# que el sexo sea un predictor independiente.

tmb_model_data <- tmb_tcga %>%
  filter(!is.na(gender), !is.na(total_perMB)) %>%
  mutate(
    gender = factor(gender, levels = c("female", "male")),
    log_tmb = log1p(total_perMB)
  )

glm_tmb <- glm(
  log_tmb ~ gender,
  data = tmb_model_data,
  family = gaussian()
)

summary_glm <- broom::tidy(glm_tmb, conf.int = TRUE)

write.csv(
  summary_glm,
  "resultados_adicionales/resultado_glm_tmb.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

coef_glm <- summary_glm %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    term = recode(term, "gendermale" = "Sexo: hombre vs mujer")
  )

p_glm <- ggplot(
  coef_glm,
  aes(x = estimate, y = term, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title = "Modelo GLM exploratorio: asociación entre sexo y log(TMB)",
    x = "Coeficiente estimado con IC 95%",
    y = NULL
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "figures/glm_tmb_sexo.png",
  plot = p_glm,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 200
)

# Versiones de paquetes para reproducibilidad
sink("session_info.txt")
sessionInfo()
sink()

message("Análisis adicionales completados correctamente.")


```
